text: As I move from the empty, ordered meeting room with its glass walls into the vibrant, information-rich R+D display, I sense a profound shift. The first space feels sterile and anticipatory, all clean lines and expectation. Yet in the R+D exhibit, awash in bold colors and interactive screens, my mind stirs with curiosity and possibility. Here, technology and creativity mingle, inviting me to consider not just where I am but what could emerge. I feel wonder and a mild excitement, as if stepping from a quiet vestibule into the restless heart of innovation itself.
